scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css && node scripts/inject-version.js
scripts.compile: babel tweaks-panel.jsx app.jsx --out-dir dist --presets @babel/preset-react,@babel/preset-env && babel components --out-dir dist/components --presets @babel/preset-react,@babel/preset-env
scripts.minify:js: terser recipes.js -o dist/recipes.js --compress --mangle && terser icons.js -o dist/icons.js --compress --mangle && terser engine.js -o dist/engine.js --compress --mangle && terser periodic-elements.js -o dist/periodic-elements.js --compress --mangle && for f in dist/tweaks-panel.js dist/app.js dist/components/library.js dist/components/play-area.js dist/components/pixel-icons.js dist/components/hint-ticker.js dist/components/top-bar.js dist/components/toasts.js dist/components/help.js; do terser "$f" --compress --mangle -o "$f"; done
